title: Cute Mob Models: Legacy Pack
description: Changes the mobs to it's classic textures and models from the original CMM for CMMRP.
body:
## Support The Team
**Discord:** https://discord.com/invite/3qmMVa97eM

**Twitter:** https://x.com/CuteMobTeam

[![LOGO](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tomanex/Image-dumping/refs/heads/main/mods/cmm/discord.jpg)](https://discord.com/invite/3qmMVa97eM)

***

# Overview
Changes the mobs to it's classic textures and models from the original CMM for CMMRP.

***

## Instructions
**For 1.21.4+**

1. Locate your .minecraft folder.

2. Open the resource_pack folder.

3. Drop the downloaded .zip file directly into the folder. Do not unzip it.

4. Restart your game.

***

## Requirements
**NOTE:** If the resource pack is not working correctly, please check following settings.

```
"Video Settings ➔ Quality ➔ Custom Entity Models" ➔ ON.

"Video Settings ➔ Quality ➔ Random Entity" ➔ ON.

"Video Settings ➔ Animations ➔ Texture Animated" ➔ ON.
```

If this does not fix the issue, please do report that, preferably with some screenshots, down under the topic.

***

## Dependencies
Download Cute Mob Models: Resource Pack [here.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cute-mob-models-resource-pack)

***
